generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor component of the MABI MAX 100 first axis that generates motion through torque conversion from input current (I_M). Operates within the angular velocity range of |q̇_max| = 75°/s."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the MABI MAX 100 first axis that provides high torque reduction with minimal backlash, integrated into the gear transmission system."
]

instance GearwheelActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the MABI MAX 100 first axis that transmits rotational motion from the motor to the cycloidal gearbox with defined gear ratio."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft of the MABI MAX 100 first axis, providing high-precision angular position data (r_M) for backlash and positional uncertainty analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 first axis, providing output angle data (r_G) for friction compensation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the MABI MAX 100 first axis, used for torque calculation and friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller providing reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) and actual values (measured position derivatives) via MQTT streaming for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerActualDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance ControllerActualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

instance SimulatedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLFirstAxisBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the MABI MAX 100 first axis including Motor, Gearwheel, and CycloidalGearbox components with defined rotational and current flow interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLFirstAxisIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the FirstAxis component with defined ports for torque (τ) and angular velocity (ω) between Motor and Gearbox subsystems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkIdealGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink base model representing ideal gearbox behavior without friction losses, serving as reference for friction compensation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the MABI MAX 100 first axis gear transmission, used for real-time friction compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Stribeck effect characteristics for the MABI MAX 100 first axis, accounting for velocity-dependent friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for the MABI MAX 100 first axis, capturing nonlinear stick-slip behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing LuGre model for the MABI MAX 100 first axis, providing detailed micro-slip dynamics analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink motor model converting input current (I_M) to torque (τ_M) using manufacturer-provided parameters for the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing the measured input current (I_M) to the motor, transmitted via MQTT from the MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MeasuredMotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing the measured motor output angle (r_M) from the primary encoder, used for backlash and positional uncertainty analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing the measured system output angle (r_G) from the secondary encoder behind the cycloidal gearbox, used for friction compensation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data (τ̇_M) generated by the SimulinkMotorModel and friction models, representing friction-compensated outputs for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationService
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data (ω̇_G) generated by the combined Simulink models, representing friction-compensated system behavior for predictive maintenance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ControllerReferenceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference values (target position, velocity, acceleration) provided by the SINUMERIK 840D controller via MQTT, used as input for friction analysis and path correction."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerReferenceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PathCorrectionService
]

instance ControllerActualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual measured values (position, derivatives) provided by the SINUMERIK 840D controller via MQTT, used for real-time comparison with simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerActualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool using SysML for structural (BDDs) and behavioral (IBDs) modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components and their interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and dynamic system behavior simulation of the gear transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
    DTDFVocab:enables PathCorrectionService
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for real-time sensor data streaming from the SINUMERIK 840D controller and physical sensors to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Conceptual framework for linking data traces to their sources (encoders, simulations) within the Digital Shadow Reference Model, enabling traceability of friction analysis inputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard application correlating measured vs. simulated data (torque-angular velocity plots) for friction analysis visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML-based structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components (Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox) and their interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:provides AxisCompositionInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using both white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterSuggestionAction
]

instance PathCorrectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time path correction for machining tasks by compensating for friction-induced inaccuracies (up to 30% positional error reduction)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service identifying wear patterns in gearboxes via deviation trends between simulated and measured angular velocity (ω_G)."
    DTDFVocab:provides WearPatternDetectionInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing real-time data streaming from MQTT protocol for sensor data (I_M, encoder readings) and derived quantities (τ, ω)."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing unified dashboard displaying reference vs. simulated data (torque τ_M, angular velocity ω_M) for friction analysis correlation."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationCorrelationInsight
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking data traces to their physical sources (encoders, simulations) within the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
    DTDFVocab:provides SourceLinkageInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance AxisCompositionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural composition of the MABI MAX 100 first axis including Motor, Gearwheel, and CycloidalGearbox components with defined rotational and current flow interconnections."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified characterization of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox using data-driven model subtraction between measured and simulated data."
]

instance ControlParameterSuggestionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested adjustments to CNC controller inputs (e.g., torque compensation) based on friction analysis, though not automatically applied to the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ProcessOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time path correction capability for machining tasks by compensating friction-induced inaccuracies, reducing positional error by up to 30%."
]

instance WearPatternDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified wear patterns in gearboxes via deviation trends between simulated and measured angular velocity (ω_G), enabling predictive maintenance."
]

instance VisualizationCorrelationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Correlated visualization of measured vs. simulated data (torque τ_M, angular velocity ω_M) enabling friction analysis verification."
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data traces to their physical sources (encoders, simulations) within the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance SourceLinkageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured linkage between data points (τ_G, ω_G) and their respective sources (motor encoder, gearbox simulation) for analysis validation."
]

// C12: Environment
instance MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis with restricted angular range [-90°, 90°] and maximum angular velocity |q̇_max| = 75°/s."
    base:contains MotorActuator
    base:contains GearwheelActuator
    base:contains CycloidalGearboxActuator
    base:contains MotorEncoderSensor
    base:contains SecondaryEncoderSensor
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor
    base:contains Sinumerik840DController
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow environment hosting the simulation models, data processing, and visualization services for the MABI MAX 100 first axis friction analysis."
    base:contains SysMLFirstAxisBDD
    base:contains SysMLFirstAxisIBD
    base:contains SimulinkIdealGearboxModel
    base:contains SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel
    base:contains SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel
    base:contains SimulinkDahlFrictionModel
    base:contains SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel
    base:contains SimulinkMotorModel
    base:contains MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    base:contains MeasuredMotorEncoderData
    base:contains MeasuredSecondaryEncoderData
    base:contains SimulatedTorqueData
    base:contains SimulatedAngularVelocityData
    base:contains ControllerReferenceData
    base:contains ControllerActualData
    base:contains SysMLEnabler
    base:contains SimulinkEnabler
    base:contains MQTTEnabler
    base:contains AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
    base:contains VisualizationEnabler
    base:contains FrictionAnalysisService
    base:contains PathCorrectionService
    base:contains PredictiveMaintenanceService
    base:contains StructuralModelingService
    base:contains DataIntegrationService
    base:contains DataVisualizationService
    base:contains DataTraceabilityService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Data acquisition**: Sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) is streamed at **high-frequency intervals** (not explicitly quantified but implied by CNC control precision).
  - **Model computation**: Simulation models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) are executed **dynamically** during operation to compute friction losses, with updates synchronized to the robot’s operational timeline.
  - **Visualization latency**: Dashboard updates reflect live data with minimal delay, enabling **immediate insights** into friction-induced inaccuracies (e.g., deviations in angular velocity ω_G)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: MABI MAX 100 first axis with motor, gearboxes, and encoders.
  - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: A **purpose-specific** representation (friction analysis) of the PT, comprising:
    - **Data Sources**: PT sensors (encoders, current sensors) and CNC controller outputs.
    - **Processing Components**: Simulation models (Motor, Gearwheel, Cycloidal Gearbox) executing in Simulink.
    - **Data Traces**: Structured arrays of torque (τ) and angular velocity (ω) linked to their origins (e.g., motor encoder, simulation).
    - **Metadata**: System properties (e.g., gear ratio, temperature) and time intervals for traceability.
  - **Orchestration**: The DS is **not autonomous**; it relies on external systems (CNC controller, Simulink) for data processing and visualization. The constellation follows a **one-way data flow** (PT → DS) with no feedback to the PT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated phase** of the physical twin’s lifecycle, focusing on **real-time monitoring and analysis** during active machining tasks. It does **not** model the **as-designed** (ideal) or **as-manufactured** phases explicitly, though engineering models (SysML) describe the **structural and behavioral baseline** of the first axis. The DT’s purpose is **operational optimization** (friction compensation) rather than design validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Verification**: Simulation models (e.g., friction models) are validated against manufacturer-provided dynamics parameters and empirical data (e.g., encoder readings).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Differences between **measured data traces** (e.g., r_G) and **simulated traces** (e.g., ˆr_G) are analyzed to quantify friction losses. The DS does **not** include explicit uncertainty propagation models but relies on **data trace correlation** for validation.
  - **Parameter Identification**: White-box models require **manufacturer parameters** (e.g., gear ratios), while black-box models use **data-driven calibration** during operation.
  - **Error Sources**: Backlash, elasticity, and sensor noise are implicitly accounted for via dual encoders (motor + secondary) and friction model subtraction from ideal behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DS) involves:
  - **Protocol**: MQTT for **real-time data streaming** from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller to the DS.
  - **Data Format**: Time-series arrays of **floating-point values** (torque τ, angular velocity ω) with metadata (source, timestamp).
  - **Network Architecture**: Implicitly **client-server** (PT as client, DS as server for visualization), though no explicit architecture diagram is provided. The connection is **one-way** (PT → DS) with no return path."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed using **local hardware** (not specified) to host the **Simulink models**, **MQTT broker**, and **dashboard visualization**. The deployment environment integrates with the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller** for sensor data acquisition. While the document does not specify cloud-based hosting or on-premise infrastructure details, the tools (Simulink, MQTT, dashboard) are executed on **on-premise hardware** co-located with the robot for low-latency operation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **SysML**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the physical twin (ISO/IEC 19506).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Conceptual framework for linking data traces to their sources (per [43]), though not explicitly standardized (e.g., no reference to Industry 4.0 AAS specifications).
  - **MQTT**: Industry-standard protocol for IoT data streaming (OASIS MQTT v3.1.1).
  - **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)**: Follows methodologies like RFLP or OOSEM for system decomposition (though not explicitly named)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The document does **not** explicitly address security or safety considerations. However, the following can be inferred:
  - **No Remote Actuation**: The digital shadow is **passive** and does not execute operations remotely on the PT, mitigating risks of human accidents.
  - **Data Integrity**: MQTT streaming ensures **real-time data consistency** for friction analysis, but no encryption or authentication mechanisms are mentioned.
  - **Safety Cell**: The robot’s **safety cell** restricts the working range to [-90°, 90°], implicitly ensuring operational safety during friction testing. No cybersecurity protocols (e.g., TLS for MQTT) are referenced."
]
